---
title: "CorrigeDatacamp"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
# 1. Descomprimir el fichero
zip_file <- "entregas.zip" # Ajustar al nombre real
unzip(zip_file, exdir = "entregas_descomprimidas")

```
